title: Pitting resistance stress-cycle factor Z_N
important_note: This JSON stores the equations explicitly shown in the figure. In the shaded high-cycle region, Shigley does not specify a single unique curve; the figure indicates the choice is influenced by lubrication regime, failure criteria, smoothness of operation required, pitchline velocity, gear material cleanliness, material ductility and fracture toughness, and residual stress.

standard_curve.label: Standard pitting-resistance curve
standard_curve.notes: Main solid-line relation shown in the figure.

nitrided_curve.label: Nitrided
nitrided_curve.notes: Dashed nitrided relation shown in the figure.

high_cycle_shaded_region.approx_domain_note: Shaded region extends in the high-cycle range to about 10^10 cycles.

lower.notes: Lower boundary of shaded region as represented by the lower edge of the band in the high-cycle region.

programmatic_use_note: Use the stored equations directly. If implementing a solver, apply the standard or nitrided curve as appropriate. In the shaded high-cycle region, use either the 'upper' or 'lower' equation according to an engineering selection rule that you document.
